hero.eyebrow: Custom Apparel, Print, Signs and Marketing
hero.headline: Make Your Business Look Ready for Bigger Opportunities.
hero.body: Affinity Creative produces custom apparel, professional print, storefront graphics, vehicle branding and digital marketing for businesses across Toronto and the GTA.
hero.trustLine: Bring us the idea. We will help turn it into something your customers can see, wear and remember.

pillarsIntro.headline: Everything You Need to Put Your Business in View.
pillarsIntro.body: Start with one service or bring several pieces together for a coordinated launch, campaign or company refresh.

touchpoints.headline: One Brand, Many Applications.
touchpoints.body: Need uniforms, vehicle graphics and printed materials for the same company? Send us the logo once and we can prepare the artwork for each use.

finalCta.headline: Have a Project in Mind?
finalCta.body: Send us the product, quantity, artwork and required date. We will review the details and help you choose the next step.
